description: Case style: Analogue watch with a stylised rectangular case and a stainless steel backDial style: Burgundy dialFeatures: A screw to reset timeStrap style: Burgundynbsp;rexin strap secured with a tang claspWater-resistant up to 30 mComes in a signature Fastrack hard caseWarranty: 2 years on mechanism only, 1-year on battery and metal strap (manufacturing defects only), no warranty on leather and other strapsWarranty provided by Brand Owner / Manufacturer
